basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) has published the Project Associate Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Project Associate position. Candidates holding an M.Tech./ M.E./ M.Sc. in Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Data Science, Machine Learning and Computing, Mathematics, Automation and Robotics, or allied fields with at least 65% marks and a valid GATE/ NET qualification are eligible to apply via email until 28-07-2026. Candidates can easily access the official notification PDF a

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech./ M.E./ M.Sc. in Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics and Communication engineering, Data Science, Machine Learning and Computing, Mathematics, Automation and Robotics or allied fields with at least 65% marks with valid GATE/ NET (UGC, CSIR, etc.) qualified.
qualification.details: M.Tech./ M.E./ M.Sc. in Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics and Communication engineering, Data Science, Machine Learning and Computing, Mathematics, Automation and Robotics or allied fields with at least 65% marks with valid GATE/ NET (UGC, CSIR, etc.) qualified. Duration: Initially for 1 year, with a possible extension of 2 additional years or until project completion, whichever is earlier.

selection_process: Review and research planning related to driver behaviour

mental workload and its based risk assessment. Support the design and administration of questionnaire surveys involving commercial bus drivers and other stakeholders. Participate in field data collection using instrumented buses across intercity routes. Contribute to data analysis for driver workload classification
and surrogate safety conflict analysis. Assist in development and validation of AI/ML and statistical models for conflict-risk prediction. Support scenario analysis
and validation studies. Contribute to preparation of technical reports
presentations and project documentation. Coordinate with transport agencies
collaborating institutions and relevant stakeholders as required.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Project Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Roorkee Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Project Associate Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Roorkee Project Associate Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: M.Tech./ M.E./ M.Sc. in Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics and Communication engineering, Data Science, Machine Learning and Computing, Mathematics, Automation and Robotics or allied fields with at least 65% marks with valid GATE/ NET (UGC, CSIR, etc.) qualified. Duration: Initially for 1 year, with a possible extension of 2 additional years or until project completion, whichever is earlier.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Roorkee Project Associate Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Review and research planning related to driver behaviour, road safety, mental workload and its based risk assessment. Support the design and administration of questionnaire surveys involving commercial bus drivers and other stakeholders. Participate in field data collection using instrumented buses across intercity routes. Contribute to data analysis for driver workload classification, driving behaviour assessment, and surrogate safety conflict analysis. Assist in development and validation of AI/ML and statistical models for conflict-risk prediction. Support scenario analysis, sensitivity analysis, and validation studies. Contribute to preparation of technical reports, research papers, presentations and project documentation. Coordinate with transport agencies, collaborating institutions and relevant stakeholders as required.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Associate position at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 28th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Tech./M.E./M.Sc. degree in relevant fields such as Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Data Science, or allied disciplines, with a minimum of 65% marks and a valid GATE/NET qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000 plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email to [email protected], along with a detailed CV and scanned copies of relevant certificates.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the duration of the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The position is initially for one year, with a possibility of extension for up to two additional years or until the project completion, whichever occurs first.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is SRIC/06.

faq.question: Q8. What are the key responsibilities of a Project Associate in this role?
faq.answer: Responsibilities include research on driver behavior and road safety, data collection, analysis using AI/ML models, and contributing to technical reports and papers.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: You need to submit a detailed CV, experience certificates, scanned attested copies of degree/certificate, and GATE certificate.

faq.question: Q10. Will there be an interview?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates will be required to attend an online interview on 28th July 2026, where original certificates will also be verified.
